calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos and Alvin Mok, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.
Petitioners Mahmut Yesilkaya and Feiz Aslan Yesilkaya; father and mother of minor present in court.
Petitioners sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Umit Yesilkaya to Dexter Umit Yesilkaya.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-02-2015 Amended
